---
id: dismiss-auto-translated-state
title: "Dismiss auto-translated"
description: "Removes 'auto translated' indication"

hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Dismiss auto-translated"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/translations/{translationId}/dismiss-auto-translated-state"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Removes "auto translated" indication
